data.title: Correction regarding Catalyst IQ's report on automotive retail performance: Focusing on precision in inventory and pricing for 2026.
data.description: Catalyst IQ recently released a report titled "2026 State of the Industry: Precision in Inventory and Pricing Will Define Automotive Retail Performance." The report emphasizes the critical role of accuracy in inventory management and pricing strategies within the automotive retail sector. This insight was provided by Catalyst IQ on January 26, 2026, through PR Newswire. The report delves into how precise inventory management and strategic pricing will be key factors shaping the performance of automotive retail businesses moving forward.

data.title: France's defense industry report predicts a budget allocation and growth forecast till 2030, driven by domestic modernization programs and NATO alliance amid Russia-Ukraine tensions. Market size and trends, budget allocation, regulations, and acquisitions are analyzed. Key numbers: forecast till 2030, next five years growth rate.
data.description: A report on the France Defense Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report forecasts the market size and growth rate from 2025 to 2030. It includes analysis of key market drivers, emerging technology trends, and challenges for market participants. This comprehensive report provides insight into budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, and the competitive landscape. The projected growth rate for the next five years is also highlighted in the report.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $93.5K liquidation sweep despite Fed rate pause, traders aim to exploit short liquidity.
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a decline from its peak during the day following the US Federal Reserve's decision not to reduce interest rates. However, data from the futures market indicates that traders might target the short liquidity within the $93,500 range of BTC.
US money-market fund assets up $7.72b for week ended January 27th - IMoneynet.

data.title: UPS beat Q4 2025 estimates with $24.5B revenue and $2.38 EPS. 2026 revenue estimate: $89.7B, above $87.938B analyst estimate. Price forecast raised to $118.00. Key takeaway: UPS is taking positive cost-cutting measures.
data.description: United Parcel Service, Inc. (NYSE: UPS) announced its Q4 2025 revenue at $24.5 billion with an adjusted EPS of $2.38, surpassing the expected $2.20 figure. UPS predicts a 2026 revenue of approximately $89.7 billion, exceeding the analyst estimate of $87.938 billion, and anticipates a non-GAAP adjusted operating margin around 9.6%. BofA Securities' analyst Ken Hoexter revised UPS's price target from $114.00 to $118.00, maintaining a Neutral rating. The quarterly EPS of $2.38 outperformed BofA's projected $2.25. Due to seasonal shifts and high early-year expenses, an expected ~47% decline in EBIT from Q4 is noted.

data.title: Strava rewards runners in global grassroots movement with free burritos via clubs, 180M users in 185 countries.
data.description: Strava, the popular app for active individuals, has seen a rise in its community of clubs that connect runners globally through collective miles. With over 180 million users spanning 185 countries, Strava has announced a new initiative offering the opportunity to receive complimentary burritos. This exciting development showcases the app's dedication to fostering camaraderie among its vast user base. The initiative comes as a way to further incentivize users to engage with the app and each other, encouraging a sense of community and accomplishment.

data.title: OSI Systems (NASDAQ: OSIS) to report EPS of $2.52 on 2026-01-29. Historical EPS beats, share price increase by 14.21%. Stock trading at $276.97, up 39.28% over last 52 weeks. Analysts rate as Buy, with target price at $287.33.
data.description: OSI Systems will release its quarterly earnings on January 29th, with analysts predicting an EPS of $2.52. Investors hope to see results surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the last quarter, OSI beat EPS by $0.05, leading to a 14.21% increase in share price the next day. In the past quarters, OSI has generally outperformed EPS estimates, resulting in positive price changes. As of January 27, shares were trading at $276.97, with a 39.28% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given OSI Systems a consensus Buy rating, with an average one-year price target of $287.33, suggesting a 3.74% upside potential. Understanding industry sentiments and analyst opinions is crucial for investors.

data.title: The Fed likely to keep rates unchanged after cutting them several times in 2025. Uncertainty remains on duration of pause.
data.description: Following a string of interest rate cuts in the second half of 2025, the central bank is anticipated to maintain stability by keeping interest rates unchanged on Wednesday. The primary query now revolves around the duration of this anticipated pause in rate adjustments.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group's report reveals gaps in data quality, governance, and literacy affecting AI adoption in 2026.
data.description: According to the latest Data Priorities 2026 report by Info-Tech Research Group, AI readiness and enterprise decision-making are being hindered by inconsistent data quality, uncertain data governance, and inadequate data literacy. The report indicates that these factors are impeding progress as companies move into 2026. The findings highlight the prevalence of these challenges, emphasizing the need for organizations to address them to improve their data strategies. This underscores the importance of investing in data management processes and training to enhance overall performance.

data.title: Levrx introduces pre-login experience for pharmacy transparency, providing timely info to members.
data.description: In Troy, New York, on January 28, 2026, Levrx emphasized the importance of providing timely information to members about their new pharmacy plan before it goes into effect. Many individuals currently face a lack of access to crucial details about how the plan will affect them. Levrx is dedicated to prioritizing the member experience throughout their healthcare journey, ensuring they are well-informed about upcoming changes.

data.title: Critics question Amazon's $35M 'Melania' film promotion, far exceeding standard documentary budgets.
data.description: The leading technology company is investing a significant $35 million in marketing efforts to support its documentary about the first lady. This amount is considerably higher than the average promotional spending for documentaries.

data.title: Self Protocol launches zero-knowledge proof-of-humanity in Google Web3's Celo Sepolia testnet faucets to filter developers, not bots.
data.description: In San Francisco, Self Protocol has revealed the launch of Self’s zero-knowledge proof-of-humanity on Google Web3’s Celo Sepolia testnet faucets, intending to allocate test tokens to authentic developers rather than automated entities like bots or AI agents. This marks the beginning of a productive partnership between Google Cloud and Self, transitioning the joint effort between the two entities from a mere announcement to a functional stage for Web3 developers. By incorporating Self into the Celo Sepolia faucet process, developers now have the opportunity to seamlessly utilize this feature.

data.title: Fed keeps federal funds rate at 3.5%–3.75% after 3 rate cuts in 2025, economic expansion continues at a solid pace.
data.description: The Federal Reserve chose to maintain the federal funds rate at 3.5%–3.75% on Wednesday, pausing its series of rate reductions from last year, which saw three decreases and led to the lowest borrowing costs since 2022. In the January 2026 statement, the Federal Open Market Committee noted that economic activity is growing at a "solid pace," an upgrade from the previous description of "moderate pace." Additionally, they mentioned signs of stability in the unemployment rate, having previously indicated a slight increase. The committee also acknowledged that inflation levels are "somewhat elevated."
